creator: fbsdbugs@sapka.me
text:
The official documentation of bazarr state that to enable postgersql as the database, all one needs to do is to update the configuration .ini file - https://wiki.bazarr.media/Additional-Configuration/PostgreSQL-Database/

It seems that FreeBSD port used .yml file. The expected keys are there.

When I stop bazarr, edit the config, start it again it still uses sqlite.

When I update config from the ui, the config file gets overwritten and postregsql gets repalced with default value.
